parents.subject: LU-8130 ldlm: convert ldlm_resource hash to rhashtable

commit.subject: LU-8130 ldlm: ldlm_resource hash direct and rcu free
commit.message:
LU-8130 ldlm: ldlm_resource hash direct and rcu free

call_rcu() to free slab resources is only needed for resources
that have been removed from the rhashtable.

Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Iccb7fb885e14e186bc18c07e383136a61b67e492
